name: Whitefield Income Limited
analysis: It is coming off a base, 15% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.4× the 20-day average) — real participation. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$1.2850, stop A$1.2319, target A$1.4272 (2.68:1) — then trail it.
